title: Docs and ledger sweep: README, config-reference, model-presets, backlog, decision supersession notes (D1)
action: Per D1 (CONTEXT.md). README.md: remove/replace ALL FOUR advisor mentions (lines ~237, ~369, ~382, and ~407 — the '**Advisor mode** (0013)' bullet in the decisions/patterns list; the verify is zero-tolerance '! grep -qi advisor', so sweep the whole file, not just the listed lines) — where a replacement is needed, describe the single fan-out pattern (best model orchestrates, gather-altitude work goes down-tier, Delegation contract in routing-and-contracts.md). docs/config-reference.md: delete the Advisor mode section (~40-56) AND the advisor entry inside the full copy-paste config sample block (~line 101); add one 'Removed keys' note: advisor removed in 0.1.23, stale key warned-and-ignored. docs/model-presets.md line ~88: drop the advisor-independence sentence. docs/backlog.md: P13 row -> done-with-closure note 'killed 2026-07-12 per fanout-delegation D1: advisor mode removed before dogfood completed; reversal logged'; P23 row stays in-flight. Add a one-line superseded note to the P8 row (advisor as first-class capability): 'advisor mode removed 2026-07-12 per fanout-delegation D1'; historical done-rows (P6) otherwise stay untouched. docs/decisions/0013-advisor-mode.md: change Status to 'reversed 2026-07-12 by fanout-delegation D1 (see .bee/decisions.jsonl reversal entry)' — do not delete the document. docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md: add a status note that its advisor-model-naming clause (lines 23-31) is obsolete with advisor removal while the core principle (ceiling = session model, never configured) stands and is now cited by the rescue ladder. Purely mechanical edits; if any instruction conflicts with what you find in a file, stop and return [BLOCKED] rather than improvising.

truths: no doc tells a user to enable advisor mode; config-reference documents the stale-key warning instead
backlog P13 is closed with a one-line reason; P23 remains the tracking row for this feature
decision docs 0013/0015 carry explicit supersession/scope notes, content preserved for archaeology
prohibitions: do not edit .bee/*.json(l) (ledger entry is orchestrator-owned via CLI)
do not touch skills/ or lib code

verify: ! grep -qi 'advisor' README.md docs/model-presets.md && grep -qi 'removed' docs/config-reference.md && grep -q 'killed 2026-07-12' docs/backlog.md && grep -q 'fanout-delegation' docs/decisions/0013-advisor-mode.md

trace.outcome: Removed all advisor mode references from 6 docs per D1; added removed-keys note to config-reference, supersession notes to decisions
